title: Vedagiriswarar temple
tagline: Vedagiriswarar temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Vedagiriswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in Tirukalukundram (also known as Thirukazhukundram), Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Vedagiriswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in Tirukalukundram (also known as Thirukazhukundram), Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram
topPlaces.description: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram is a Siva temple in Tirukalukundram in Chengalpattu District in Tamil Nadu, India. This temple is also known as Urutthiran Temple, Rudhran Temple and Ruthrankoil.

topPlaces.name: Tirukalukundram
topPlaces.description: Tirukalukundram (Tamil: திருக்கழுக்குன்றம், romanized: tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam), also known as Tirukazhukundram, is a panchayat town and taluk head of Tirukalukundram taluk in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is famous for the Vedagiriswarar_Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Andikuppam
topPlaces.description: Andikuppam is a village near Panruti, Tamil Nadu, India, where at least 700 hindu families earn their living. The place is well known for a 100-year-old hindu located here.

topPlaces.name: Mullipakkam
topPlaces.description: Mullipakkam is a medium size village located at a distance of 12 km (approximately) away from the town of Chengalpattu. It comes under the Thiruporur Taluk and Chengalpattu District of Tamilnadu.

topPlaces.name: Ottivakkam
topPlaces.description: Ottivakkam is a suburb of Chennai located south of Tirumani. It has a suburban railway station and falls under south line.

topPlaces.name: Rayamangalam, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Rayamangalam is a small village located at a distance of 16 km (approximately) away from the town of Chengalpattu and 13 km (approximately) away from Thiruporur. It comes under the Thiruporur Taluk and Chengalpattu District of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram is a Siva temple in Tirukalukundram in Chengalpattu District in Tamil Nadu, India. This temple is also known as Urutthiran Temple, Rudhran Temple and Ruthrankoil.

Tirukalukundram (Tamil: திருக்கழுக்குன்றம், romanized: tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam), also known as Tirukazhukundram, is a panchayat town and taluk head of Tirukalukundram taluk in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is famous for the Vedagiriswarar_Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.
Andikuppam is a village near Panruti, Tamil Nadu, India, where at least 700 hindu families earn their living. The place is well known for a 100-year-old hindu located here.
Mullipakkam is a medium size village located at a distance of 12 km (approximately) away from the town of Chengalpattu. It comes under the Thiruporur Taluk and Chengalpattu District of Tamilnadu.
Ottivakkam is a suburb of Chennai located south of Tirumani. It has a suburban railway station and falls under south line.

Rayamangalam is a small village located at a distance of 16 km (approximately) away from the town of Chengalpattu and 13 km (approximately) away from Thiruporur. It comes under the Thiruporur Taluk and Chengalpattu District of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vedagiriswarar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vedagiriswarar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vedagiriswarar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vedagiriswarar temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vedagiriswarar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vedagiriswarar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vedagiriswarar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vedagiriswarar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Tirukalukundram, Tirukalukundram, Andikuppam, Mullipakkam, Ottivakkam.
